controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: Define, publish, and maintain information security policies that reflect the organization’s commitment to ISO 27001 compliance.

controls.title: Governance and oversight
controls.description: Establish executive governance, risk ownership, and accountability for information security objectives.

controls.title: Information security risk management
controls.description: Maintain a formal, repeatable process for risk assessment and treatment that aligns with the organization’s risk tolerance.

controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.description: Assign and document roles and responsibilities for information security across the organization.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.description: Separate tasks and privileges to prevent conflicts of interest and reduce the risk of fraud or error.

controls.title: Third-party security management
controls.description: Apply security controls consistently across suppliers, vendors, and contracted service providers.

controls.title: Information security in project management
controls.description: Embed security requirements into project planning, change management, and development lifecycles.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships
controls.description: Require suppliers to meet the organization’s minimum security requirements and monitor performance.

controls.title: Threat intelligence and awareness
controls.description: Collect and use threat intelligence to improve security posture and inform risk treatment decisions.

controls.title: Information security performance evaluation
controls.description: Measure and report information security performance through metrics, KPIs, and management reviews.

controls.title: Management review of information security
controls.description: Conduct periodic senior management reviews of the information security management system.

controls.title: Legal and regulatory compliance
controls.description: Identify applicable legal, regulatory, contractual, and industry requirements for information security.

controls.title: Information security policy maintenance
controls.description: Review and update policies in response to changes in business objectives, risks, or regulations.

controls.title: Communication of security requirements
controls.description: Ensure information security responsibilities and policy changes are communicated clearly to all stakeholders.

controls.title: Information classification and handling
controls.description: Classify information assets and apply handling rules appropriate to sensitivity and business value.

controls.title: Records management
controls.description: Protect the integrity and confidentiality of security records through retention and disposal controls.

controls.title: Business continuity integration
controls.description: Integrate information security objectives with business continuity and resilience planning.

controls.title: Security in organizational change
controls.description: Manage information security risks during organizational restructuring, mergers, and acquisitions.

controls.title: Information security budget and resource planning
controls.description: Allocate the resources required to sustain and improve security controls over time.

controls.title: Incident management and escalation
controls.description: Define clear incident response processes and escalation paths for security events.

controls.title: Information security awareness programs
controls.description: Develop training and awareness programs that align employee behavior with security policies.

controls.title: Internal audit and compliance assurance
controls.description: Conduct internal audits to verify control effectiveness and compliance with ISO requirements.

controls.title: Organizational change control
controls.description: Apply controls for managing organizational changes that may affect information security.

controls.title: Information security communication
controls.description: Maintain channels for reporting security incidents and policy exceptions.

controls.title: Supplier security performance reviews
controls.description: Review third-party security performance and compliance with contractual obligations.

controls.title: Security governance framework
controls.description: Use a governance framework that aligns security activities with business strategy.

controls.title: Risk treatment planning
controls.description: Document and monitor risk treatment plans, including responsibility and timelines.

controls.title: Information security documentation
controls.description: Maintain documented procedures and evidence for key information security activities.

controls.title: Policy exceptions and waivers
controls.description: Define a controlled process for approving, tracking, and reviewing policy exceptions.

controls.title: Competence and awareness evaluation
controls.description: Validate that staff have the knowledge required to fulfill their security responsibilities.

controls.title: Cloud and service provider security
controls.description: Apply organizational controls to cloud services and external data processing providers.

controls.title: Security of supporting processes
controls.description: Protect supporting business processes that enable information security operations.

controls.title: Information security risk treatment review
controls.description: Regularly review the outcomes of risk treatment actions and update controls as needed.

controls.title: Security reporting and accountability
controls.description: Provide regular reporting on security incidents, risks, and control status.

controls.title: Organizational compliance monitoring
controls.description: Monitor compliance with internal policies, contracts, and applicable regulations.

controls.title: Security roles for remote work
controls.description: Ensure remote and hybrid work arrangements include defined security roles and responsibilities.

controls.title: Control ownership and stewardship
controls.description: Assign ownership for critical controls and ensure they remain accountable for their operation.

controls.title: Personnel screening
controls.description: Screen employees and contractors to ensure they are suitable for their roles with security responsibilities.

controls.title: Terms and conditions of employment
controls.description: Include security responsibilities and confidentiality obligations in employment contracts.

controls.title: Awareness, education and training
controls.description: Provide security training to employees, contractors, and relevant third parties.

controls.title: Disciplinary process
controls.description: Enforce a consistent disciplinary process for security policy violations.

controls.title: Termination and role changes
controls.description: Manage security access and responsibilities when personnel leave or change roles.

controls.title: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements
controls.description: Ensure that personnel and third parties sign confidentiality agreements when required.

controls.title: Personnel security responsibilities
controls.description: Document and communicate security duties for all staff and contractors.

controls.title: Human resources security in project management
controls.description: Incorporate people-related security requirements into projects and service delivery.

controls.title: Physical access control
controls.description: Restrict physical access to secure areas and assets to authorized personnel only.

controls.title: Work area security
controls.description: Protect work areas from unauthorized access, interference, and environmental threats.

controls.title: Equipment security
controls.description: Secure equipment to prevent theft, loss, or unauthorized use.

controls.title: Secure disposal and re-use
controls.description: Dispose of or reuse physical assets in a way that protects sensitive information.

controls.title: Environmental protection
controls.description: Protect facilities from fire, flood, electricity failure and other environmental threats.

controls.title: Secure areas
controls.description: Designate and protect secure areas that support critical information processing.

controls.title: Visitor control
controls.description: Manage visitor access and supervision in secure areas.

controls.title: Asset management for physical devices
controls.description: Track and protect physical devices and media throughout their lifecycle.

controls.title: Physical entry controls
controls.description: Control entry and exit points for buildings and secure zones.

controls.title: Supporting utility security
controls.description: Protect utilities such as power, water, and HVAC that support key operations.

controls.title: Physical security monitoring
controls.description: Monitor physical security controls and log events for investigation.

controls.title: Protection of cabling and networked equipment
controls.description: Protect cabling and equipment from interception, damage, or disruption.

controls.title: Controlled access to storage areas
controls.description: Secure storage areas containing sensitive equipment or media.

controls.title: Security for mobile and portable devices
controls.description: Protect mobile and portable devices from unauthorized use and loss.

controls.title: Operational procedures and responsibilities
controls.description: Document operation procedures and assign responsibility for secure IT operations.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: Ensure changes to systems and services are controlled and authorized.

controls.title: Capacity and performance management
controls.description: Monitor and manage capacity to prevent outages and degradation.

controls.title: Malware protection
controls.description: Protect systems against malware through detection, prevention, and response controls.

controls.title: Backup and recovery
controls.description: Protect and recover information through regular backups and recovery testing.

controls.title: Logging and monitoring
controls.description: Collect and analyze logs to detect security events and support investigations.

controls.title: Operational software control
controls.description: Control the distribution and use of operational software.

controls.title: Technical vulnerability management
controls.description: Identify and remediate technical vulnerabilities in systems and applications.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description: Restrict logical access to systems and information based on business needs.

controls.title: Identification and authentication
controls.description: Authenticate users and devices before granting access to resources.

controls.title: Secure configuration
controls.description: Apply secure configurations to systems, devices, and services.

controls.title: Cryptographic controls
controls.description: Use cryptographic methods to protect sensitive information in transit and storage.

controls.title: Network security
controls.description: Protect network infrastructures using segmentation, controls, and monitoring.

controls.title: System acquisition, development and maintenance
controls.description: Incorporate security requirements into system development and maintenance.

controls.title: Supplier service delivery management
controls.description: Monitor and control the delivery of services by external suppliers.

controls.title: Information transfer policies
controls.description: Protect information during electronic and physical transfer.

controls.title: Electronic messaging protection
controls.description: Protect the security of email and messaging systems.

controls.title: System security testing
controls.description: Test systems regularly to validate security controls and identify weaknesses.

controls.title: Network architecture security
controls.description: Design network architecture to reduce attack surface and support security controls.

controls.title: Secure development practices
controls.description: Apply secure design and coding practices during software development.

controls.title: Application security
controls.description: Protect applications from common security threats throughout the software lifecycle.

controls.title: Endpoint security
controls.description: Protect endpoints with controls such as hardening, monitoring, and anti-malware.

controls.title: Cloud service security
controls.description: Ensure cloud services are configured and operated securely.

controls.title: Mobile device security
controls.description: Protect mobile devices from unauthorized access and data leakage.

controls.title: Remote access security
controls.description: Secure remote access methods and ensure strong authentication.

controls.title: Network device security
controls.description: Secure routers, switches, firewalls and other network devices.

controls.title: Database security
controls.description: Protect database systems and the sensitive information they contain.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.description: Detect and prevent unauthorized disclosure of sensitive information.

controls.title: Identity and access provisioning
controls.description: Control how user identities are created, provisioned, and revoked.

controls.title: Privileged access management
controls.description: Protect and monitor privileged accounts and administrative access.

controls.title: Infrastructure service security
controls.description: Secure the services that support critical IT infrastructure.

controls.title: Monitoring and alerting
controls.description: Use monitoring and alerting to detect abnormal behavior and security incidents.

controls.title: Information security for applications
controls.description: Apply security controls to applications handling sensitive business information.

controls.title: Protection of information in transit
controls.description: Protect information transmitted over external and internal networks.
